description: Create a custom map layer for the 'Noto Aftershock Zone' and configure SeisComP Map View (scmv) to display it with station labels. Define the zone as a polygon at `~/.seiscomp/bna/noto_zone.bna` using vertices (37.10N, 136.60E), (37.50N, 136.60E), (37.50N, 137.50E), and (37.10N, 137.50E). Enable station annotations in `~/.seiscomp/scmv.cfg` and save a screenshot of the scmv window showing the polygon and station names to `/home/ga/scmv_layer_verification.png`.
